attributes.action: Teachers to abide by the school uniform regulations
attributes.additional_details: Making it a government guideline that they are required to do this
attributes.background: Teachers to follow the school uniform guidelines regarding Nails, make up, facial piercings, jewellery

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Require teachers to follow the school uniform standards as pupils" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757763
